name: Encampment
rules_text: Cast on friendly recruit group of two or more not in a structure. Group disappears. Creates a friendly colo- ny with Encamped (cannot be tar- geted by spells; created novices are eliminated). At start of turn of cast- ing +3 (or earliest turn thereafter), if not occupied, Colony is dispelled (which destroys colony), group reappears, and is fully healed. If captured, target group is removed from the game.
